'''âd-k-z-r''' ('''kadakzeroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:publish|publish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-k-z-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:publish|publish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-k-z-r
|-
! Lemma
| kadakzeroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidakzeroko|thidakzeroko]] || [[word:jidakzeroko|jidakzeroko]] || [[word:shidakzeroko|shidakzeroko]] || [[word:kidakzeroko|kidakzeroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudakzeroko|thuthudakzeroko]] || [[word:jujudakzeroko|jujudakzeroko]] || [[word:shushudakzeroko|shushudakzeroko]] || [[word:kukudakzeroko|kukudakzeroko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodakzeroko|thodakzeroko]] || [[word:jodakzeroko|jodakzeroko]] || [[word:shodakzeroko|shodakzeroko]] || [[word:kodakzeroko|kodakzeroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdakzeroko|thĂŠdakzeroko]] || [[word:jĂŠdakzeroko|jĂŠdakzeroko]] || [[word:shĂŠdakzeroko|shĂŠdakzeroko]] || [[word:kĂŠdakzeroko|kĂŠdakzeroko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadakzeroko|thadakzeroko]] || [[word:jadakzeroko|jadakzeroko]] || [[word:shadakzeroko|shadakzeroko]] || [[word:kadakzeroko|kadakzeroko]]
